_note: Create landing page — handloom creation journey. Inspired by Shopify aprire.

hero.title: Start and create anything.
hero.subtitle: From a thread of an idea to a living storefront. Design your fabric, make your products, and sell everywhere AI reaches.

sections.label: Fabric
sections.heading: Choose your fabric.
sections.body: Browse swatches by region, weave, or material. Every colour tells a story — handloom cotton from Bengal, silks from Varanasi, khadi from Gujarat. Select, save, and build your palette.

sections.label: Products
sections.heading: Make your products.
sections.body: Turn your fabric into products in minutes. Add pricing, variations, and your maker’s story. AI drafts descriptions, SEO, and compliance docs as you go.

sections.label: Sell
sections.heading: Sell online, everywhere.
sections.body: Your storefront goes live on your domain, Instagram, WhatsApp, and AI agents simultaneously. One update reaches every channel. No re-keying, no copies.

sections.label: Grow
sections.heading: Grow with AI.
sections.body: Let AI agents optimise your listings, suggest new weaves, and re-engage buyers. Your brand, powered by intelligence that learns your craft.

cta.title: Your first product is waiting.
cta.body: Join the weavers, dyers, and makers already bringing handcrafted commerce to every corner of the web.
